title: elatostema filicoides
intro: Elatostema filicoides, also known as the "False Fern", is a type of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Elatostema filicoides include reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Elatostema filicoides can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
